title: Trump ally Rick Scott running to lead Senate GOP in 2025
shortDescription: Scott ran against McConnell for the Senate GOP leadership job in 2022 and lost. Now McConnell is stepping down, and Scott is running again.

title: Judge postpones Hunter Biden trial on tax charges to Sept. 5
